what_was_done: Built Docker-based isolated evolution sprint. Created ~/.claude/docker/ (Dockerfile, entrypoint.sh, prepare-worktree.sh, run-sprint.sh, sprint-prompt.md). Worktree at ~/agents/evolution-sprint/ — 25 skills, 11 agents, AGENT_TEAMS=1, security_profile=refactor, analytics MCP. Cold-restarted memory server.
known_issues: CRITICAL: voice-web routing — messages go to CLI instance instead of tmux pane
hasAvailableSubscription can go stale — check on resume if 1M context missing
TAP watchdog + fallback not wired into heartbeat loop yet
MCP SSE sessions can go stale — restart Claude session to reconnect
next_steps: Watch sprint: docker exec -it evolution-sprint tmux attach -t sprint
Review sprint results: cd ~/agents/evolution-sprint && git log --oneline
Merge good changes from evolution-sprint branch back to dag-claude
Memory server cold-restarted — verify tools register in new session
